content:
Against The Wind chords
Bob Seger & The Silver Bullet Band   1980

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Against_the_Wind_(Bob_Seger_song)

[Intro]

[ch]G[/ch]

[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
It seems like yesterday,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
 but it was long ago.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]
Janey was lovely; she was the queen of my nights,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
there in the darkness with the radio, playing low.[/tab]

And the secrets that we shared,
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
 the mountains that we moved[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
Caught like wildfire out of control,[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]D[/ch]
till there was nothing left to burn and nothing left to prove.[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
And I remember what she said to me,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
how she swore that it never would end.[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
I remember how she held me,  oh so tight.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]
Wish I didn't know now what I didn't know then.[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
Against the wind, we were running against the wind.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
We were young and strong, we were running against the wind.[/tab]

[Verse 2]

[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
And the years rolled slowly past. [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
 And I found myself alone.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
Surrounded by strangers I thought were my friends,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
I found myself further and further from my home.[/tab]

And I guess I lost my way.
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
 There were oh, so many roads.[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
I was living to run, and running to live,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                                   [ch]D[/ch]
never worrying about paying, or even how much I owed.[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
Movin' 8 miles a minute for months at a time,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
breaking all of the rules that would bend.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
I begin to find myself just searching,[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]D[/ch]
searching for shelter again and again.[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]G[/ch]
Against the wind,  a little something against the wind.[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
I found myself seeking shelter against the wind.[/tab]

[Interlude]

Piano solo over verse

[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Well those drifter's days are past me now,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
I've got so much more to think about.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
Deadlines and commitments;[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]
what to leave in, what to leave out.[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab] [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
Against the wind,[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]G[/ch]
I'm still running against the wind.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
I'm older now but still running against the wind.[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]D7[/ch]
Well, I'm older now but still running against the wind.[/tab]
